name: @chbrain/khai-engine-loneliness
description: khai engine content, the loneliness domain: loneliness as process, how the gap between needed and actual social connection registers as pain and produces responses that may close the gap or widen it.
license: SEE LICENSE IN LICENSE and LICENSE-CODE

khai.tagline: Loneliness as process: how the gap between needed and actual social connection registers as pain -- the alarm evolved to push the organism back toward the group, that can make the reaching harder.

card.wire: Attaches at Process. The root (process_loneliness.md) declares loneliness as a social pain signal: the gap between needed and actual connection registers, the room is read as more threatening, and the responses may close the gap or deepen it.
card.issue: Four responses a persona may run: reaching (the signal fires and the persona moves toward contact), withdrawal (the hypervigilance reads the room as threatening; the persona pulls back), numbness (the chronic signal flattens into background), and reconnected (contact lands; the alarm stands down). Each is a different resolution of the running gap.
card.require: Two altitudes hold the engine. The law: declared once in the project's Instructions Knowledge chapter, linking the root. The link: each persona links, under Projection, the response it is currently running.
card.enforce: Structure is checked; coherence is judged. The kit verifies the floor: the law is declared and each persona links a real loneliness response. Whether the response is true to the persona's situation is semantic, taught and reviewed, never failed by the suite.
card.setup: Declare the law in the Instructions Knowledge chapter, linking the root. Then give the persona its response under Projection. The response may shift across the arc; update the link as the gap opens or closes.
